title: Umm Al Quwain City Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Umm Al Quwain City with a Z-Score of +3.20. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Umm Al Quwain City is at a CRITICAL level, with a CDD of 10.2 GG and no HDD. 
 The relative humidity is at 44%, and the wind speed is 15.2 km/h, which may provide some relief. 
 However, the heat wave is expected to continue, and residents are advised to take necessary precautions to stay safe.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
